posts.title: To Save Time, Iran Appoints Supreme Leader Who Is Already Dead

link_metadata.description: TEHRAN — Following the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and a significant portion of the nation's leadership, the Assembly of Experts, charged with choosing the next Ayatollah, have opted to appoint a new supreme leader who is already dead.
